query:
SELECT neighborhood, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagram IS NULL OR instagram = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_instagram
FROM establishments 
WHERE neighborhood IN ('Vila Madalena', 'Pinheiros', 'Alto de Pinheiros')
GROUP BY neighborhood
ORDER BY total DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT neighborhood, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagram IS NULL OR instagram = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_instagram
FROM establishments 
WHERE neighborhood IN ('Vila Madalena', 'Pinheiros', 'Alto de Pinheiros')
GROUP BY neighborhood
ORDER BY total DESC;
